hero.text: You are the architect of your own destiny.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today is a day of opportunities. Embrace new beginnings.
aries.love: Trust your instincts in matters of the heart; they will guide you well.
aries.career: Collaboration with peers may lead to innovative solutions.

taurus.general: Patience will be your greatest ally today; allow things to unfold.
taurus.love: A deep conversation could strengthen your relationship.
taurus.career: Be open to feedback; it may lead you to unexpected paths.

gemini.general: Communicate openly to resolve ongoing conflicts.
gemini.love: Spontaneity could spark new excitement in your love life.
gemini.career: Your adaptability is your strongest asset; use it wisely.

cancer.general: Focus on self-care; it's essential for your well-being.
cancer.love: Express your feelings openly; vulnerability is a strength.
cancer.career: Creative solutions will come when you least expect them.

leo.general: Shine bright today; your energy is infectious.
leo.love: A romantic gesture will deepen your connection.
leo.career: Leadership opportunities may arise; be ready to step up.

virgo.general: Embrace changes; they are leading you to growth.
virgo.career: Focus on details to avoid potential pitfalls.

libra.general: Balance is key; seek equilibrium in all areas of life.
libra.love: A heart-to-heart conversation can resolve misunderstandings.
libra.career: Networking could lead to new opportunities.

scorpio.general: Your intuition will guide you through tough decisions.
scorpio.love: Passion is in the air; embrace it.
scorpio.career: Trust your instincts; they will lead you to success.

sagittarius.general: Adventure awaits you; step out of your comfort zone.
sagittarius.love: A chance encounter could ignite a new romance.
sagittarius.career: Opportunities for travel may come your way.

capricorn.general: Dedication will bring you closer to your goals.
capricorn.love: Show appreciation for your partner today.
capricorn.career: Hard work will finally pay off; stay committed.

aquarius.general: Innovative ideas will flow; don’t hold back.
aquarius.love: Friendship could blossom into something more.
aquarius.career: Collaboration will lead to groundbreaking results.

pisces.general: Dreams may hold the key to solutions; pay attention.
pisces.love: Empathy will deepen your bonds today.
pisces.career: Creative projects could be particularly fruitful now.

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: The road to success and the road to failure are almost exactly the same.
professional.author: Colin R. Davis

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: You miss 100% of the shots you don’t take.
professional.author: Wayne Gretzky

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
motivation.author: Confucius

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
motivation.author: Zig Ziglar

motivation.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
motivation.author: Walt Whitman

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

captions.text: Embrace the journey, not just the destination.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Make today so awesome that yesterday gets jealous.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: The best is yet to come.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The great growling engine of change—the technology revolution.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: Technology is a useful servant but a dangerous master.
tech.author: Christian Lous Lange

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: Why so serious? Have some fun!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
fun.author: Helen Keller

fun.text: Do something today that your future self will thank you for.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: All our dreams can come true if we have the courage to pursue them.
faith.author: Walt Disney

faith.text: Believe you can, and you're halfway there.
faith.author: Theodore Roosevelt

faith.text: Everything that is done in this world is done by hope.
faith.author: Martin Luther

faith.text: Faith sees the invisible, believes the unbelievable, and receives the impossible.
faith.author: Corrie ten Boom

faith.text: Doubt kills more dreams than failure ever will.
faith.author: Suzy Kassem

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: What you do speaks so loudly that I cannot hear what you say.
wisdom.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

wisdom.text: Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
wisdom.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

wisdom.text: The wise man doesn't lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, the first step is silence, the second listening, the third remembering.
wisdom.author: Solomon ibn Gabirol
